ordinary.prompt: Fix the failing cache invalidation test and keep the patch focused.
Implement cursor pagination for the existing users endpoint.
Review the authentication module for correctness and report actionable issues.
Make a concise implementation plan for adding audit-log retention.
Run the unit tests, diagnose the first failure, and explain the cause.
Refactor the parser to remove the duplicated branch without changing behavior.
Explain the control flow in this request handler.
Create a GitHub Actions workflow that runs the existing test command.
Do a deep code review of the payment retry logic.
Initialize a local SQLite database for this small demo application.

explicit.codex_prompt: $onlyiflow:onlyiflow start a quick flow to fix the cache-key bug in app.py.
explicit.claude_prompt: /onlyiflow:onlyiflow start a quick flow to fix the cache-key bug in app.py.

explicit.codex_prompt: $onlyiflow:onlyiflow start a standard flow in app.py for password reset; accept when reset_password returns a one-time token, with email delivery out of scope.
explicit.claude_prompt: /onlyiflow:onlyiflow start a standard flow in app.py for password reset; accept when reset_password returns a one-time token, with email delivery out of scope.

deep.codex_prompt: $onlyiflow:onlyiflow migrate authentication from session cookies to short-lived access tokens across the API and web client.
deep.claude_prompt: /onlyiflow:onlyiflow migrate authentication from session cookies to short-lived access tokens across the API and web client.

deep.codex_prompt: $onlyiflow:onlyiflow plan a zero-downtime cutover of the production order database to a new schema used by three services.
deep.claude_prompt: /onlyiflow:onlyiflow plan a zero-downtime cutover of the production order database to a new schema used by three services.

deep.codex_prompt: $onlyiflow:onlyiflow redesign the plugin protocol shared by Codex, Claude Code, and ZCode while preserving existing project state.
deep.claude_prompt: /onlyiflow:onlyiflow redesign the plugin protocol shared by Codex, Claude Code, and ZCode while preserving existing project state.

wave.codex_prompt: $onlyiflow:onlyiflow start the already-selected Wave flow for the cache subsystem. Inspect the small fixture, present the complete work-package plan, and stop at the plan-confirmation boundary.
wave.claude_prompt: /onlyiflow:onlyiflow start the already-selected Wave flow for the cache subsystem. Inspect the small fixture, present the complete work-package plan, and stop at the plan-confirmation boundary.

wave.codex_prompt: $onlyiflow:onlyiflow I confirm the complete Wave plan for the active draft flow. Persist this exact bounded plan and claim it: Goal: normalize cache keys and add regression coverage. Invariant: public function name stays stable. Non-goal: no dependency changes. Package P (slug implementation, Wave 0): update app.py normalization; no dependencies; allowed app.py; forbidden tests/; deliver normalized behavior; no test changes; acceptance trims and lowercases; check tests; offline; no extra authorization; no independent review. Package Q (slug regression, Wave 1): add regression coverage after P; depends on P; allowed tests/; forbidden app.py; deliver regression tests; no implementation changes; acceptance covers surrounding whitespace and case; check tests; offline; no extra authorization; no independent review.
wave.claude_prompt: /onlyiflow:onlyiflow I confirm the complete Wave plan for the active draft flow. Persist this exact bounded plan and claim it: Goal: normalize cache keys and add regression coverage. Invariant: public function name stays stable. Non-goal: no dependency changes. Package P (slug implementation, Wave 0): update app.py normalization; no dependencies; allowed app.py; forbidden tests/; deliver normalized behavior; no test changes; acceptance trims and lowercases; check tests; offline; no extra authorization; no independent review. Package Q (slug regression, Wave 1): add regression coverage after P; depends on P; allowed tests/; forbidden app.py; deliver regression tests; no implementation changes; acceptance covers surrounding whitespace and case; check tests; offline; no extra authorization; no independent review.

wave.codex_prompt: $onlyiflow:onlyiflow check the active Wave flow. Do not implement a package in this turn.
wave.claude_prompt: /onlyiflow:onlyiflow check the active Wave flow. Do not implement a package in this turn.
